stepText: Do While Guthix Sleeps if you haven’t already. Start and complete Dragon Slayer II (using your Bow of Faerdhinen to deal with the strong bosses – protect from magic and antifire potions will, when combined, provide decent dragonfire protection except against metal dragons and Galvek where you need the shield plus a rune crossbow), putting Ellen’s XP at the end on Strength. Kill Vorkath up to 50 times to get an Ava’s Assembler. Complete Monkey Madness II (put Duke’s xp on Strength).
